title: hieracium murorum subsp. pseudocrassiceps
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudocrassiceps, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. pseudocrassiceps include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic to help alleviate water retention. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
